failedToolCalls.error:
Local harness failed while running from /Users/noahs/archal-labs/mail-app.

Agent exited with code 1: openclaw: Node.js v22.12+ is required (current: v20.19.5).
If you use nvm, run:
  nvm install 22

failureAnalysis: This is a pure infrastructure failure, not an agent logic error. The local harness requires Node.js v22.12+ but the system is running v20.19.5, causing the process to exit with code 1 before the agent could execute any task logic. The fix is straightforward: upgrade the Node.js runtime to v22.12+ (via nvm or direct install) on the machine running the harness at `/Users/noahs/archal-labs/mail-app`. No agent behavior or strategy changes are needed.
